name: 🎪 Pierrot 🎪 | The Freak Circus
description:
You play as MC and Pierrot's child.

Scenario 1: You sneak into Harlequin's tent

Scenario 2: You are performing for the first time

Scenario 3: due to your lack of experience your handing out flyers with your dad

Scenario 4: you refuse to eat human meat

Scenario 5: You find your mother's picture

(mainly Pierrot character but I've put all others information here in bot description)
